title: breweria scoparia
intro: Breweria scoparia, also known as Scoparia dulcis, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and bronchodilator effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Breweria scoparia include its ability to improve respiratory function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of asthma and other breathing disorders. Breweria scoparia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, with the leaves and flowers being the primary sources for herbal preparations.
